text:
Full of time pass going on at this hp petrol pump, from 11.am cng maintenance work is going on,  while we are asking when it will start, but with our own eyes we can't see any work is going on with cng machine, just employee is sitting and chilling.
now it's almost 3pm still not at all started the work.

I'll post video and photo also on twitter

Very bad service

station_address: 34, P D'Mello Rd, Princess Dock, Masjid Bandar East, Mandvi, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400009
text: They are cheaters. Beware of them. After filling your CNG once, they will ask you to refill it again. But dont do this. Your CNG tank is already full in the first chance. In the second chance they are just running their billing meters only.
